urdu transliteration text:
Ya KareemaO Generous OneEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Tera bhai imame zamin haitera baba dare hawaij hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Your brother is known as Imam Zamin (the Guarantor),
Your father is Babul Hawa’ij (the one who grants all requests)

urdu transliteration text:
tune paaya hai zainabi rutbakazmi hai hasab nasab terahai raza ki riza teri marzihai gilaafe haram tera parda
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You have achieved the status of Zainab (a.s)
Your lineage is Kadhimi,
Your consent is the same as the consent of your brother (a.s.)
The curtains of your shrine are covering you

You are under the protection of the
You are blessed with the name of Fatima,
You are the beauty of your father,
And speak in the manner of Zainab

urdu transliteration text:
tere rauze ko ye sa'adat haimarkaze fatema se nisbat fark do markado me itna haiwo baqaiyya ye qum ki jannat hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Your shrine has the honour of being likened to the grave of Fatima,
The only difference is, that is in Jannat ul Baqee,
And yours is in Qum
People of both worlds come and visit you when they go to Jamkaran,

When you reached Qum, you witnessed a strange sight,
You mourned for your brother in such a way, that you made Qum like Karbala

Grant us knowledge and wisdom,
Grant us a life like that of Bahlool,
Give us the opportunity to serve you
